title: Squirrel Removal in Somers, NY | Best Pest Control NYC | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Somers, NY. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Serving Westchester County. Call today for fast service!
intro: Dealing with squirrels invading your Somers property? Best Pest Control NYC provides professional squirrel removal services throughout Somers and the surrounding Westchester County area. Our experienced technicians use humane, effective methods to safely remove squirrels and prevent future infestations in your home or business.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings decades of experience serving Somers residents with reliable, humane squirrel removal solutions. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges posed by Westchester's wildlife and provide comprehensive services including removal, exclusion, and damage repair with transparent pricing from $900 to $2,500.
localContext: Somers' wooded residential areas near the Muscoot Reservoir and historic properties along Route 202 provide ideal habitats for squirrels seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. The town's mix of colonial homes, modern developments, and properties near Lasdon Park & Arboretum often experience increased squirrel activity, especially during fall and winter months when these pests seek warm nesting sites.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Somers, NY?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Somers typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work to seal entry points, and cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Somers attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the attic or walls, especially during early morning and evening hours, visible droppings, chewed wood or wires, damaged insulation, and gnaw marks around roof edges or vents. You may also notice squirrels entering and exiting through openings in your roofline or soffits.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Somers humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Yes, our squirrel removal methods comply with all New York State wildlife regulations and prioritize humane treatment. We use live traps and exclusion techniques that allow squirrels to leave but not re-enter. Our technicians are licensed and follow all Westchester County ordinances regarding wildlife management.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Somers home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Somers properties. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. After removal, we seal all entry points and provide repairs to prevent future problems, ensuring long-term protection for your home.
